profile.terms_detail:
ArtLink Terms of Service

1. This app applies a zero-tolerance policy for inappropriate content and misuse.
2. Users may report inappropriate content, which will be reviewed within 24 hours.
3. Users who violate the terms may be removed from the service.
4. Please refer to the full terms you agreed to upon first launching the app.

Contact: lcy1152@naver.com
profile.privacy_detail:
ArtLink Privacy Policy

1. Personal information collected: name, email, profile information
2. Purpose of collection: providing and improving the service
3. Retention period: until account deletion
4. Third-party sharing: none
5. Users may delete their personal information at any time by deleting their account.

Contact: lcy1152@naver.com

eula_doc.title: ArtLink Terms of Service
eula_doc.article1_body: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using the services provided by ArtLink (hereinafter "the App"), as well as the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between users and the App.
eula_doc.article2_body: ArtLink provides practice note management, matching, and portfolio management services for artists and creators.
eula_doc.article3_body:
1. Users must not engage in the following:
   - Harassment, threats, or discriminatory speech toward others
   - Posting illegal or harmful content
   - Posting pornography, violent content, or hate speech
   - Unauthorized collection or distribution of others' personal information
   - Spam, fraud, or spreading false information
   - Intellectual property infringement
2. Users are responsible for the content they post.
eula_doc.article4_body:
1. The App applies a zero-tolerance policy toward inappropriate content and misuse.
2. Inappropriate content includes, but is not limited to:
   - Sexually explicit content
   - Content promoting violence
   - Discriminatory content based on race, gender, religion, disability, etc.
   - Content promoting illegal activities
3. Inappropriate content may be removed without prior notice.
eula_doc.article5_body:
1. Users may report inappropriate content or misuse through the in-app reporting feature.
2. Users may block other users, and blocked users' content will be immediately removed from the feed.
3. Reported content will be reviewed and addressed by the operations team within 24 hours.
eula_doc.article6_body:
1. Users who violate these Terms may face the following sanctions:
   - Content removal
   - Temporary suspension of service
   - Permanent account suspension
2. Users who post inappropriate content may be immediately removed from the service.
eula_doc.article7_body:
1. The App collects only the minimum personal information necessary for service provision.
2. Collected information is used solely for service provision.
3. When using the AI analysis feature, the following data is sent via Artlink's server to OpenAI: note titles and content, attached images and videos, voice recordings (transcribed to text), document (PDF) text, field information, profile information (career, role models, interests, specialties), and previous AI analysis history (up to 10 recent entries). Transmitted data is used solely for generating AI feedback.
4. After AI analysis, anonymized usage statistics (device identifier, field, tags, etc.) are stored in Supabase for service improvement.
5. Third-party data processing: OpenAI (AI feedback generation) and Supabase (data storage) maintain data protection standards equivalent to those of Artlink.
6. Data transmission for AI analysis requires separate user consent upon first use of the analysis feature.
7. Users may delete their personal information at any time by deleting their account.
eula_doc.article8_body:
1. The App is not responsible for disputes between users.
2. The App is not liable for damages caused by service interruptions or data loss.
eula_doc.article9_body:
For inquiries regarding service usage, please contact us at:
Email: lcy1152@naver.com

aiDisclosure.title: AI Analysis Data Notice
aiDisclosure.message:
When using AI analysis, the following data is sent via Artlink's server to OpenAI to generate feedback.

Data sent:
• Note title and content
• Attached images and videos
• Voice recordings (transcribed to text before sending)
• Attached documents (PDF text)
• Field information (acting, music, etc.)
• Profile information (career, role models, interests, specialties)
• Previous note AI analysis history (up to 10 recent summaries)

After AI analysis, anonymized usage statistics (device identifier, field, tags, etc.) are stored in Supabase for service improvement.

Data is used solely for generating AI feedback and improving the service. OpenAI and Supabase provide equivalent levels of data protection.

Please refer to our Privacy Policy for details.
